target: 10th Loop
18. July 24
July 24
Now then, this mikoshi will descend the shrine path and be carried to Omoto Beach!
There, we will load the trash collected in the clean-up contest onto the mikoshi... Ah, but even though it's trash, it's a part of the gods!
And then we will ascend the shrine path once more, and return to the shrine grounds!
If you parade along with this mikoshi, and then watch the Umi-okuri afterwards, surprisingly!!
Your health luck will skyrocket with Hiruko-sama's divine protection!!! Everyone, please feel free to participate!
You can also see the fireworks reeeeally well from the shrine grounds, so it's highly recommended~~!! Everyone, let's live a long life together with me!!!
(A long life, huh...)
(Come to think of it, I hadn't thought about tomorrow at all.)
Looking sharp in that outfit, Karikiri-san!
Shinpei-kun…
Do your best today, okay?
Haha, thanks!
...Shinpei-kun? What's wrong?
The search for Ushio is canceled!
...He looped, didn't he?
Shinpei's "certainty"... I thought it was about Ushio. That he planned to increase Ushio to two and storm Hiruko Cave...!
But I was wrong, his "certainty" was... The reason he hid the location of the handprint was...!!
Haine... what exactly did you see...?
In the Hiruko Cave…
That bastard... he used the loop to thrust Ushio right at my throat...!!
The search of the Kii Channel... Are there any strays ignoring my signal?
...What do you mean?
Shinpei's position has disappeared, and about an hour has passed. What do you make of this, Shide?
...He erased that handprint?
The handprint can't be erased... That is a mark placed on Shinpei's existence itself.
But, his presence can be blocked off. Like you do, inside the mud...
I gave him a little... too many hints.
Most of the strays are out searching for Ushio. If they charge into Hiruko Cave now...
No, it's too early for that.
They came to my sleeping quarters once and were almost "checkmated"... Unless they have absolute certainty, they can't re-enter--
--is what Shinpei would think.
Then, what on earth are they hiding for?
This is just speculation from here, but--
What if... only the "Ushio" attached to Shinpei knew the location of her own self drifting in the Kii Channel-- "Ushio"...
To make contact with Ushio before us, he's hiding his own position so as not to tell us Ushio's location... Shinpei would do that.
Find Ushio... We must dispose of her before they do...!
It's quiet…
Yes... It's been quiet for a while now. That means Shinpei-san's plan is working.
…Hm.
Covering the left eye with a hand brings out Ryunosuke's personality, huh--
...To think we could talk like this again. Ryunosuke.
My sister... was grateful to you, Nezu-san...
Huh?
For saving her 14 years ago.
Ah... ...Sometimes... I got letters from Hizuru...
Saying she made good pickled eggplants, or that she started keeping a cat... trivial things...
When I heard the book she wrote became a movie, I was floored... heheh. Like, why didn't you tell me you became a novelist first...
You were the only one who knew that in real life, Nezu-san.
...What was up with her? Was she shy!?
Because Nezu-san was the only adult... who believed my sister's story about the shadows.
Hmph... thanks to that, even I was treated like a weirdo! Well... I'm used to that sort of thing, though.
...I trust you, Nezu-san.
My sister, and me.
...No need for words... at this point...
It's here...!!
